title: Function Calling Loop with Tool Choice
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Optimization for Generative AI
description: Sequence diagram of the OpenAI function-calling round-trip with interactive tool_choice variants and per-step token annotations.

educational.topic: Function Calling Loop with Tool Choice
learningObjectives: Implement an OpenAI function-calling round trip
Choose the right tool_choice setting for a given workload

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Interactive sequence diagram with mode selector and contextual explanations
keyQuestions: Which tool_choice setting always uses 2 API round trips?
commonMisconceptions: Thinking tool_choice=auto always calls a tool
Thinking tool_choice=required is safe for arbitrary inputs
assessmentOpportunities: Pick the right tool_choice setting for a list of described workloads
